title: Salmon Rice Bowl
tagline: The TikTok-viral crispy rice bowl with everything sauce.
description: Crispy-skinned salmon over rice with kimchi, avocado, and the famous 'everything' sauce (mayo, soy, sriracha). The viral recipe that started it all.
steps: Mix all sauce ingredients in a small bowl. Set aside.
Pat salmon dry with paper towels. Season skin side with salt. Season flesh side with salt and pepper.
Heat oil in a non-stick skillet over medium-high heat. Place salmon skin-side down. Press gently with spatula for first 30 seconds to prevent curling.
Cook 4-5 minutes until skin is very crispy. Flip and cook 2-3 more minutes for medium (or longer if you prefer well-done).
Divide rice between two bowls. Top with kimchi, avocado slices, and nori strips.
Place salmon on top (skin-side up for maximum crunch). Drizzle generously with sauce.
Garnish with green onions and sesame seeds. Serve immediately.
notes: The crispy skin is essential. Make sure salmon is very dry and pan is hot.
Kewpie mayo is creamier than regular mayo - find it in the Asian section.
Add a jammy egg (6-min boil) for extra protein.
